title: Penalties for noncompliance
doc_html:
§3325.  Penalties for noncompliance

Refusal by a faculty member to comply with the provisions of this Part may result in the forfeiture of tenure and ineligibility for increase of salary and promotion in rank until the necessary requirements are met.

Acts 1991, No. 858, §1.
